scripts.test: bun run --filter goodkiddo-bot test && bun run --filter goodkiddo-web test
scripts.check: bun run --filter goodkiddo-bot check && bun run --filter goodkiddo-web check
scripts.format: bun run --filter goodkiddo-bot format && bun run --filter goodkiddo-web format
scripts.lint: bun run --filter goodkiddo-bot lint && bun run --filter goodkiddo-web lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter goodkiddo-bot typecheck && bun run --filter goodkiddo-web typecheck
